01 — about

A bit about me

I'm a third-year B.E. Computer Science and Technology student at SNS College of Engineering, currently holding a CGPA of 8.15. I like turning ideas into working software — whether that's a sensor-driven ML system or a simple web app that solves a real problem.

Outside coursework, I've been building hands-on experience through internships in frontend development and applied AI, alongside certifications in databases, cloud AI foundations, and digital skills.
